top_signals.title: Philippine Peso at 63.5 Per Dollar Might Be Okay, Governor Says
top_signals.summary: The Philippine peso at 63.50 against dollar might be okay as long as the decline is measured and not inflationary, Governor Eli Remolona said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Opening Remarks by Commissioner Kadis at the European Maritime Day 2026 in Limassol, Cyprus
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Limassol, 21 May 2026 Deputy Minister Hadjimanolis, Mayor Armeftis, dear colleagues and friends of the maritime community, ladies and gentlemen,
It is an honour to address you today ...
